summary: SINGLE_FOCUS Stern-Brocot tree. ValueTracker level_tr reveals levels 1→5; always_redraw builds each level by inserting mediants (a+c)/(b+d) between consecutive pairs. RED endpoints 0/1, ∞; BLUE→TEAL interior ancestor levels; YELLOW current level; GREY edges connect each mediant to its two parents. Live 2^L+1 fraction count.
